description: A relationship manager (RM) is responsible for managing and servicing a portfolio of bank customers. Queries about RM often involve aggregating customer deposit data by rm_id or rm_name.

A branch is a physical banking location. Customers and relationship managers are associated with branches. Queries about branches may involve filtering or aggregating customers and deposits by branch.
Deposit amount represents the total amount of money held in a customer deposit account. It is the main metric used for ranking customers and calculating totals or averages.
Customer ranking is usually based on deposit_amount in descending order. Higher deposit amounts indicate more valuable customers from a banking relationship perspective.
Common banking analytical questions include top customers by deposit, average deposit per relationship manager, total deposit per branch, and customer lists under a specific manager.
